item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested new transfer channel, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding pools/queues/entrances/supervisor lines for each dispute, reframes the failure as upstream routing/intake/ownership ambiguity, and proposes a consolidated redefinition of routing and responsibility instead.
